description: Chapter 7 - Addition of angular momenta. A guided structure for coupled bases, tensor-product spaces, Clebsch-Gordan coefficients, magnetic moments and Hund's rules.

topics.title: Why angular momenta must be added
topics.note: Physical interactions involving spin, orbital motion, exchange, anisotropy and external magnetic fields.

topics.title: Local and coupled observables
topics.note: Commuting operator sets, independent subspaces and the distinction between local and total quantum numbers.

topics.title: Triangle rule and projection rule
topics.note: Allowed total angular momenta, multiplet dimensions and the selection condition m = m1 + m2.

topics.title: Sequential coupling trees
topics.note: Building coupled bases for three or more momenta and tracking intermediate angular momentum labels.

topics.title: Alternative coupling schemes and multiplicity
topics.note: Non-sequential trees, repeated multiplets and dimension checks that remain invariant across coupling orders.

topics.title: Expanding the Hilbert space
topics.note: Tensor products, composite-state dimension and the embedding of local operators into a common space.

topics.title: Composite operators and spin interactions
topics.note: Constructing expanded matrices and reading exchange processes in scalar-product Hamiltonians.

topics.title: Clebsch-Gordan coefficients
topics.note: The amplitudes that connect local and coupled bases, together with selection rules and unitarity.

topics.title: Constructing coupled states by ladder operators
topics.note: Highest-weight states, successive lowering, orthogonality and normalization of triplets, singlets and higher multiplets.

topics.title: Wigner 3j symbols and the Racah formula
topics.note: A finite computational form for Clebsch-Gordan coefficients and the rules that eliminate forbidden terms.

topics.title: Coupling N angular momenta
topics.note: Recursive binary couplings, intermediate projections and the factorized construction of large basis transformations.

topics.title: Changing basis and reading spectra
topics.note: Transforming operators with the Clebsch-Gordan matrix and choosing the basis adapted to a Hamiltonian's symmetries.

topics.title: Magnetic moments, Lande factor and Zeeman effect
topics.note: Combining spin and orbital magnetic moments, projecting along total angular momentum and splitting multiplets in a field.

topics.title: Atomic coupling schemes
topics.note: LS coupling, j-j coupling, closed shells and how atomic angular momenta are assembled.

topics.title: Hund's rules and term symbols
topics.note: Maximizing spin and orbital angular momentum, spin-orbit ordering and Russell-Saunders notation.

topics.title: Chapter synthesis: coupled quantum systems
topics.note: A decision framework for choosing observables, coupling trees, basis transformations and multiplet labels.
